description: Sasha scrolls down the ANZ Standard Variable Rate Home Loan page, reviewing the listed features and fees.
page_title: ANZ Standard Variable Rate Home Loan
frame_description: The user is looking at the 'Keep in mind' and 'Fees' sections of the ANZ home loan page.

description: Sasha hovers over the information icon next to the comparison rate.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the small 'i' icon next to the 6.49% p.a. comparison rate.

description: A tooltip appears explaining how the comparison rate is calculated.
frame_description: A grey box with white text appears above the comparison rate, providing a definition of the comparison rate.

description: Sasha continues scrolling down the page towards the 'Learn more' link.
frame_description: The page moves vertically as the user scrolls past the comparison rate section.

description: Sasha clicks on the 'Learn more >' link.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'Learn more' link located under the comparison rate.

description: The page navigates to the detailed ANZ Standard Variable home loan page.
frame_description: The screen flashes pink/white as the new page loads, eventually showing the ANZ Standard Variable home loan landing page.

description: Sasha hovers over the 'Request call back' button.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the blue 'Request call back' button in the hero section.

description: Sasha hovers over the 'Apply online' button.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and pauses over the green 'Apply online' button.

description: Sasha scrolls down the page, reviewing the 'Jump to' links, the cashback offer, and the variable rate negotiation section.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the main image of a woman and baby, looking at the content below.

description: Sasha hovers over the 'Tell me more' button in the cashback offer section.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'Tell me more' button under the $3,000 bonus for first home buyers offer.

description: Sasha scrolls back up the page towards the top hero section.
frame_description: The page content moves downwards as the user scrolls back up.

description: Sasha hovers over the 'Request a call back' button in the 'Negotiate your variable rate' section.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the blue button next to the image of an ANZ representative.

description: Sasha scrolls down to the bottom of the page and then quickly back up to the top.
frame_description: The user performs a rapid scroll down and then back up, likely looking for specific information or a way to navigate back.

description: The comparison rate tooltip appears briefly as the user hovers over the info icon while scrolling.
frame_description: The grey tooltip box flickers on screen as the cursor passes over the info icon.

description: Sasha navigates back to the Google search results page.
frame_description: The ANZ page is replaced by a white loading screen, which then displays the Google search results.

description: Sasha scrolls through the Google search results, scanning the titles and descriptions of various home loan comparison sites.
frame_description: The user scrolls past results from ANZ, Bank of Melbourne, AMP, and IMB Bank.

description: Sasha clicks on the 'Choosing a home loan' link from Moneysmart.gov.au.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the blue link for the Moneysmart article.

description: The page navigates to the Moneysmart 'Choosing a home loan' article.
frame_description: The Moneysmart website loads, showing a blue and green header with the title 'Choosing a home loan'.

description: Sasha scrolls through the Moneysmart article, reading about repayment types, loan terms, and interest rate comparisons.
frame_description: The user scrolls slowly through the text-heavy article, pausing to read different sections.
